name: Graphex Group Limited
summary: Graphex Group Limited, an investment holding company, provides landscape architecture services in Hong Kong and Mainland China. It operates through three segments: Landscape Design, The Catering Business Focuses on the Operation of Restaurants, and Manufacture and Sale of Graphene Products. The company undertakes the residential development, infrastructure and public open space, commercial and mixed-use development, and tourism and hotel projects, as well as provides landscape design, master planning, and urban design services. It also provides design development and drawing support, and interior design services; invests in food industry; and operates restaurants in Mainland China and Italy. In addition, the company manufactures and sells of graphene product. It offers landscape architecture services to governments, public bodies, private property developers, state-owned property developers, town planning companies, architecture companies, and engineering companies. The company was formerly known as Earthasia International Holdings Limited and changed its name to Graphex Group Limited in April 2021. Graphex Group Limited was founded in 1981 and is headquartered in Causeway Bay, Hong Kong.
